[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 100001111 5
2 000111000 3
3 011011011 6
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 000000000 a
7 000000000 a
